title: Azure incident affecting West US 2
impact: Between 04:24 UTC and 20:18 UTC on 29 May 2026, a service disruption affected multiple Azure services in the West US 2 region. Impacted customers experienced service connectivity failures, timeouts, and elevated error rates when attempting to access resources in the region. Additionally, customers may have experienced an inability to deploy new resources or scale existing workloads, intermittent availability where some requests succeeded while others failed depending on which infrastructure node
